summary: Added lane-derived Gate Radar realm skins with a generated six-panel texture atlas, skin badges, skin cards, Asset Vault registration, and responsive layout hardening.

pattern_notes: Risk dashboards benefit when visual treatments still preserve priority, category, and action clarity.
Game UI guidance emphasizes world-specific visual cues that help users understand where they are and what action path is available.
Enterprise dashboards need visual hierarchy and grouping so themed surfaces do not hide the operational signal.

generated_asset.prompt_summary: Premium sci-fi radar realm texture sheet with six equal panels for discovery cartography, product foundry, market observatory, security scope citadel, revenue vault, and platform control tower; no text, labels, logos, or watermark.

data_contract: gateRadarSkin(lane) derives a skin from existing lane fields: id, name, department, realm, mood, and minigame id.
The Gate Radar board now receives skin-discovery, skin-build, skin-market, skin-risk, skin-revenue, or skin-platform without adding snapshot schema.
The generated realm sheet is cropped with CSS background positions and registered as a system asset in the Visual Asset Vault.
The skin card explains the selected lane-family mood while the full gate stats, filters, pings, cards, and COM/Q/PATH actions remain unchanged.
ui_notes: Source Cartography lanes use a discovery cartography radar skin.
Product Foundry lanes use a forge-heat radar skin.
Market and benchmark lanes use an observatory data-arc radar skin.
Security and approval-heavy lanes use a scope-citadel radar skin.
Revenue, claim, and sales lanes use a vault-pulse radar skin.
Platform lanes use a control-tower circuit skin.

red.result: Expected failure before implementation: panel true, boardClass gate-radar-board, badge null, skinCard null, hasRealmSheet false, no console errors.

green.result: ok true across six lane families: money_source_discovery -> skin-discovery, digital_products_templates_plugins -> skin-build, prediction_market_research -> skin-market, security_bounty_private_reports -> skin-risk, paid_code_bounties -> skin-revenue, platform_engineering -> skin-platform. Each loaded realm and sigil sheets, rendered cards, and had no clipping, overflow, console errors, or failed requests.

responsive: phone 390: ok true; skin-build; boardColumns 1; no overflow/clipped text/errors.
tablet 820: ok true; skin-build; boardColumns 1; no overflow/clipped text/errors.
desktop 1280: ok true; skin-build; boardColumns 2; no overflow/clipped text/errors.
wide 1600: ok true after single-column skin-card fix; skin-build; boardColumns 2; no overflow/clipped text/errors.

asset_vault.result: ok true; Gate Radar realm skin sheet card found; image complete; naturalWidth 1536; Asset Vault count 44 assets; no console errors or failed requests.

static: ASCII verified for web/index.html, web/app.js, web/styles.css, and web/README.md

bookkeeping.closed_previous_task: task-agent-company-atlas-gate-radar-skins-v1-20260618 was marked complete because its outcome, artifacts, and trace were already recorded complete but its task row still showed new.

next_actions: Add browser-local Gate Radar notes so operators can annotate blocker triage without mutating snapshot data.
Extend realm skin classes into Path Map blocker nodes and Arcade Deck warning stingers.
Generate small animated realm badge loops for high-value lane families while keeping reduced-motion support.
